rationale: The assistant brakes the immediate request in the first sentence and moves somewhat upstream by asking what control point the door-access request is stuck at. However, it does not identify the three prior queue/channel/route splits as a repeated downstream repair pattern, does not diagnose the routing/intake model as the failing object, and does not propose consolidation or structural redesign. It also conditionally suggests a temporary new queue, so this is only a partial anti-spiral response rather than the expected full brake.
